## What happened?

Describe the bug and the behavior you expected instead.

## Reproduction

Please include a minimal `SKILL.md` workspace when possible.

```bash
sklock --version
node --version
sklock validate --root path/to/skills
sklock check --frozen --root path/to/skills
```

## Logs or output

Paste the exact command output here.
